queries.by-topic: [inputs | select(.tags | length > 0)] | group_by(.tags[0]) | map({topic: .[0].tags[0], count: length, stories: .})
queries.by-source: [inputs] | group_by(.source) | map({source: .[0].source, count: length}) | sort_by(.count) | reverse
queries.for-topic: def filter_topic(t): [inputs | select(.tags | index(t) != null)]; filter_topic("{{topic}}")
queries.quality-distribution: {high: ([.[] | select(.quality >= 0.35)] | length), medium: ([.[] | select(.quality >= 0.2 and .quality < 0.35)] | length), low: ([.[] | select(.quality < 0.2)] | length)}
queries.type-counts: [inputs] | {origin: (map(select(.type == "origin")) | length), lesson: (map(select(.type == "lesson")) | length), insight: (map(select(.type == "insight")) | length), anti: (map(select(.type == "anti-pattern")) | length)}
queries.topic-availability: [inputs | select(.tags | length > 0)] | group_by(.tags[0]) | map({topic: .[0].tags[0], total: length, high_q: (map(select(.quality >= 0.35)) | length), types: (map(.type) | group_by(.) | map({type: .[0], count: length}))})
queries.random-sample: def sample(n): [inputs | select(.quality >= 0.2)] | [.] | _nwise(length / n | floor) | .[0]; sample({{count}})
